title: forge-meta.json
description: Authoritative schema for forge's per-project metadata file at .claude/forge-meta.json. Validated by tooling-generation/SKILL.md Step 4 before write.

version.description: Forge plugin version that wrote this file (semver).

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the initial scaffold.

onboardVersion.description: Onboard plugin version resolved at runtime (CLI-first then sibling-path) per tooling-generation/SKILL.md Step 1. Never hardcoded.

context.description: Phase 1 context object — project description, tech stack, preferences.

webResearch.description: Stack research findings cached at scaffold time.

toolingFlags.description: Single namespace for all generated artifact lists, callerExtras passthrough, and onboard status mirrors. The top-level dot-notation siblings (generated.tooling / generated.cicd / generated.harness) are removed as of L5 in the 2026-04-16 release-gate sweep — everything lives under toolingFlags.

tooling.description: Generated tooling file paths (CLAUDE.md, rules, skills, agents).

harness.description: Forge-only harness artifact paths (init.sh, docs/feature-list.json, docs/progress.md).

hookStatus.description: Mirrored verbatim from /onboard:generate response. See onboard/skills/generation/SKILL.md § Hook Status Telemetry for the canonical shape.
